title: Truly Performed
description:
Baseline optimization with nothing extra.
Nothing beats that!
body:
Truly Performed is an optimized Minecraft modpack designed to maximize performance that is built on the Quilt mod loader, offering a streamlined and modern modding toolchain with an open ecosystem. Its compatibility with any servers makes it a main feature as it does not contain any QOL mods!

## Improved Speed

Truly Performed offers significant benefits for Minecraft players, including:

+ **Improved gameplay**
+ **Faster load times**
+ **Reduced lag**
+ **Increased FPS**

By using the most effective optimization mods, Truly Performed provides unmatched performance. This is achieved by using a range of [modern optimization mods.](https://github.com/TheUsefulLists/UsefulMods.)
These mods have been tested and optimized to ensure that Minecraft runs at maximum performance and speed.

## How its done

Truly Performed includes preset tweaks designed to maximize performance and gameplay without any additional configuration needed. These tweaks optimize various hardware configurations, ensuring that players get the best possible performance without having to make any changes themselves.

## Quilt Mod Loader

Truly Performed is built on the [Quilt Mod Loader](https://quiltmc.org/en/), which provides a streamlined and modern modding toolchain with an open ecosystem. Quilt focuses on speed, usability, and modularity, making it the perfect choice for an optimized modpack like Truly Performed.

**Due to some current issues, the modloader has been changed to Fabric Mod Loader.**

## Fast Updates

Truly Performed is regularly updated to ensure that it is always up-to-date and provides the best possible performance. These updates are fast, so players can be sure that they will always have access to the latest Minecraft optimizations.

## Check it out!

Check out [Truly Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/trulyoptimized/), our other modpack designed for users who want optimization with optifine parity features. Truly Optimized is based out of Truly Performed which offers performance optimizations with quality of life and Optifine Parity features for players looking to maximize their Minecraft experience.

##  Beta Phase

Truly Performed is currently in the Beta phase, so feedback from users is greatly appreciated as we continue to develop and improve the modpack.

<details>

<summary>Version Format</summary>

- Major versions will be y.x.x
- Versions with bugfixes, new mods, config changes, etc will be x.y.x
- Extremely minor changes will be x.x.y 

</details>
